---
title: "Journal club heifer weight"
subtitle: "ANSCI 4040 – Dairy Data Analysis & Analytics"
editor: visual
---

# Details/Subtopics 
- Peer presentations about four different papers highlighting different aspects of heifer weight at insemination. 

# Activities/Tasks 
Questions:
- What is the lay-out of the study? 
- Which statistics were used?
- How strong do you think the evidence is?
- Potential pitfalls/sources of bias?
- What does this study tell us that helps us answer the question?
- How applicable is this to CDREC
- What data can we look at to verify this?

# Due Dates 
- April 16 2:30 pm

# Datasets/Resources 
- Course materials and lecture notes > canvas
